user.title: Connect to Auto Cal
user.description: Enter your Auto Cal server URL and API key. Generate an API key in Auto Cal's Settings page with at least **read** scope.

data_description.url: Base URL of your Auto Cal server, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:4000

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Auto Cal server. Check the URL and that the server is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Auto Cal server and API key are already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Auto Cal server.
